title: Dreaming of Northern Lights: Enchanting Hope
seoDescription: What does it mean to see aurora (northern lights) in a dream? Spiritual enlightenment, miracles, colorful dreams, inspiration, and peace.
introduction: The northern lights are a dance of the sky. Seeing the aurora in a dream symbolizes that there will be many **'Enchanting and Miraculous'** beauties in your life. It represents spiritual enlightenment, inspiration, and that hope will shine in colorful ways even in gloomy (dark/cold) days.
symbolism:
The color of the lights:

**Green Light:** Symbolizes healing, peace, and natural balance.

**Purple/Pink Light:** Represents high spirituality, love, and the dream realm.

**Watching the Lights:** Indicates an achievement you will admire or the emergence of an artistic talent.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** In this phase, the miracles and spiritual enlightenment offered by the Northern Lights carry an inspiring energy for new beginnings. It shows that you are ready to embark on a new journey in your life and that the time has come to discover your inner potential.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** The Waxing Moon symbolizes a period of increasing energy and development. The colors of the Northern Lights, especially green and purple tones, call for spiritual transformation and the emergence of your artistic talents; during this process, you can find yourself and seize opportunities for progress in creative projects.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon is a moment of completion and enlightenment. The glow of the Northern Lights symbolizes that your admirable achievements and fulfilling emotional experiences have reached their peak, and that you have enriched yourself spiritually and emotionally.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** The Waning Moon is a period of letting go and transformation. The sparkle of the Northern Lights reminds you that it is time to cleanse from past gloomy thoughts and to move forward with a new perspective; as you release old burdens, you can find ways to achieve inner peace and balance.
commonScenarios: Taking a photo: Symbolizes immortalizing a beautiful moment and sharing happiness.
Watching with a loved one: Indicates a very romantic and spiritually strong relationship.
The lights disappearing: Signifies the fading of inspiration or the passing of an enthusiasm.
cta: The dream of the northern lights is a source of inspiration. Download the Dream Boat app to color your dreams.
